system.description: *The Hollow at its absolute limit — the brief full Shell-state as a weapon.* Enter full Shell-state for one complete round. You cannot be targeted, damaged, or affected by anything during this round. At the start of your next turn, return and deal 28 + RESONANCE resonant damage to all enemies within 25 feet. Apply Expose 6, Vulnerable 6, and Stagger to each. Restore 16 + FRAME HP to yourself. For the rest of combat, all your cards deal +RESONANCE bonus damage for each 20 HP you are missing. The doctrine never accounted for you. That is your answer to it.
